title: Tokenomics Deep Dive
subtitle: Design Sustainable Token Economies
description: Master tokenomics design — supply mechanics, emission schedules, vesting, treasury management, and governance. Build token models that create lasting value.

lessons.title: Supply Mechanics
lessons.description: Total supply, inflation/deflation, mint/burn mechanisms, and supply curves.
lessons.topics: Supply design, Inflation models, Burn mechanisms, Supply caps

lessons.title: Emission Schedules
lessons.description: Designing release schedules for team, investors, community, and ecosystem.
lessons.topics: Vesting schedules, Linear vs staged, Cliff periods, TGE planning

lessons.title: Treasury Management
lessons.description: Managing protocol treasuries — diversification, spending, and sustainability.
lessons.topics: Treasury diversification, Stablecoin reserves, Yield strategies, Spending policies

lessons.title: Governance Design
lessons.description: Token-weighted voting, quorum, delegation, and proposal frameworks.
lessons.topics: Voting mechanisms, Quorum design, Delegation, Proposal lifecycle

lessons.title: Incentive Alignment
lessons.description: Designing incentives that align user behavior with protocol health.
lessons.topics: Staking incentives, Liquidity mining, Retroactive rewards, Sybil resistance

lessons.title: Case Study Analysis
lessons.description: Analyzing real token launches — what worked, what broke, what to avoid.
lessons.topics: Case studies, Post-mortems, Modeling tools, Stress testing
